session.user:
Run the ty type checker on the codebase at /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report what you find.
Run: `ty check` from the project root.
session.assistant: I'll run the ty type checker on the codebase and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ty type checker on codebase

session.assistant:
ty passed: All type checks passed with no errors found.
**Summary:** The type checker completed successfully with zero diagnostics across the entire codebase.
